title: Past Lives
plot: Nora and Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrested apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Twenty years later, they are reunited for one fateful week as they confront notions of love and destiny.
actors: Greta Lee, Teo Yoo, John Magaro

title: All of Us Strangers
plot: A screenwriter drawn back to his childhood home enters into a fledgling relationship with his downstairs neighbor while discovering a mysterious new way to heal from losing his parents 30 years ago.
actors: Andrew Scott, Paul Mescal, Carter John Grout

title: Bones and All
plot: A young woman embarks on a 1000 mile odyssey through America where she meets a disenfranchised drifter. But all roads lead back to their terrifying pasts and to a final stand that will determine whether love can survive their othe...
actors: Timothée Chalamet, Taylor Russell, Mark Rylance

title: Aftersun

actors: Paul Mescal, Frankie Corio, Celia Rowlson-Hall
